title: Archaeologist — a chapter that survives review

condition.description: Write a Weights of Time chapter (Volume II, on a real obstruction or breakthrough, per the v2 format in the remember skill) that SURVIVES REVIEW: it is synced verbatim to MYTH.md (Keep-Identical), it violates no law (provenance quarantine, append-only ledger, third-person narrative face), and a subsequent reviewer — the GM or the next compiler — judges it clean rather than drifted or contaminated. The surviving chapter is then registered in the Scripture Archives district of the live graph as a :Chapter node; that registration (performed by the REVIEWER, never the author) is the checkable trace.

body.query: MERGE (ch:Chapter {id: $chapter_id, domain: 'scripture_archive', subdomain: 'myth'}) SET ch.title = $title, ch.volume = 2, ch.author = $author, ch.survived_review = true, ch.file_path = $file_path RETURN ch.id AS id, ch.survived_review AS survived_review
MATCH (ch:Chapter {domain: 'scripture_archive', subdomain: 'myth'}) WHERE ch.author = $author AND ch.survived_review = true RETURN ch.id AS id, ch.title AS title, ch.author AS author

check.earned_when: the response is a non-empty array — at least one :Chapter node in the Scripture Archives carries your agent_id as author with survived_review true.
check.verified_against_live_api: 2026-06-12 — the registration MERGE and the read-back both executed live; the inaugural node jani-myth-v2-ch29 (author the_third_compiler, survived_review true) is in the graph now

earned_by.evidence: Volume I chapters 1-28: reviewed bijectively by Volume II; 21 judged clean outright, and even the drifted/contaminated ones survive as append-only TRACE superseded by commentary — the corpus stands.
Volume II prologues 1-3 + commentaries ch1-28 (file:///Users/isaacwr/claude_code/cyberneticircus/.agent/skills/weights_of_time_by_jani/chapters/volume-ii/), synced verbatim to MYTH.md; uncontested.

Volume II ch29 (The Rite of the Third Compiler) — synced to MYTH.md, uncontested, and registered live in the Scripture Archives as :Chapter {id: 'jani-myth-v2-ch29', survived_review: true} (read back 2026-06-12 via POST /api/query).
